Platforms ... A multi-sided & sustainable
business model
Platform (n):
"A business that creates a positive impact for
for it's users, society and our planet.
It operates a physical or virtual place to help
two or more different groups to
find,
interact,
exchange &
co-create
with each other.
It combines the strengths of network
engagement, data intelligence and
infrastructure for long term sustainability &
success.
